Name: Flask of Relentless Assault
Materials: 7x Terocone, 3x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Melee DPS (Rogues, Warriors, Enh Shamans, Ret Paladins), Hunters
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest. Mana Thistle: Rare high-level herb found in all Outland zones on cliff edges and elevated areas. Fel Lotus: Very rare random drop from ANY Outland herb node - sell these at a premium.

Name: Flask of Pure Death
Effect: +80 Shadow/Fire/Frost Spell Damage (2hr, persists through death)
Materials: 7x Nightmare Vine, 3x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Warlocks, Shadow Priests, Fire/Frost Mages
Farming Notes: Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm (high-level zones). Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges in all Outland zones. Fel Lotus: Very rare from any Outland herb node.

Name: Flask of Blinding Light
Effect: +80 Arcane/Holy/Nature Spell Damage (2hr, persists through death)
Materials: 7x Netherbloom, 3x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Balance Druids, Holy Paladins, Elemental Shamans, Arcane Mages
Farming Notes: Netherbloom: Herb found in Netherstorm. Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges in all Outland zones. Fel Lotus: Very rare from any Outland herb node.

Name: Flask of Mighty Restoration
Materials: 7x Dreaming Glory, 3x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Healers (Resto Shamans, Holy Priests, Resto Druids, Holy Paladins)
Farming Notes: Dreaming Glory: Common herb in all Outland zones especially Nagrand and Terokkar Forest. Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges. Fel Lotus: Very rare from any Outland herb node.

Name: Flask of Fortification
Effect: +500 HP and +10 Defense Rating (2hr, persists through death)
Materials: 7x Ancient Lichen, 3x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Tanks (Prot Warriors, Prot Paladins, Feral Druids)
Farming Notes: Ancient Lichen: Found INSIDE Outland dungeons only (Underbog, Slave Pens, Mana-Tombs, Auchenai Crypts, etc). Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges. Fel Lotus: Very rare from any Outland herb node.

Name: Flask of Chromatic Wonder
Effect: +35 All Resistances and +18 All Stats (2hr, persists through death)
Materials: 7x Dreaming Glory, 3x Netherbloom, 1x Fel Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Versatile/budget option for any role; tanks on resistance fights
Farming Notes: Dreaming Glory: Common herb in all Outland zones. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm. Fel Lotus: Very rare from any Outland herb node.

Name: Elixir of Major Agility
Typical Users: Rogues, Hunters, Feral Druids, Enh Shamans
Farming Notes: Felweed: Very common herb in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh. Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest.

Name: Elixir of Major Strength
Typical Users: Warriors, Ret Paladins, Enh Shamans
Farming Notes: Mountain Silversage: Classic herb from Winterspring, Eastern Plaguelands, Burning Steppes, Un'Goro Crater. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Elixir of Mastery
Typical Users: Feral Druid tanks, versatile/budget option for any class
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Elixir of Major Shadow Power
Materials: 1x Nightmare Vine, 1x Ancient Lichen, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Warlocks, Shadow Priests
Farming Notes: Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm. Ancient Lichen: Found inside Outland dungeons only.

Name: Elixir of Major Firepower
Materials: 2x Mote of Fire, 1x Ancient Lichen, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Fire Mages, Destruction Warlocks
Farming Notes: Mote of Fire: Drops from fire elementals in Hellfire Peninsula (Hand of Gul'dan area), Nagrand, Shadowmoon Valley. 10 Motes = 1 Primal Fire. Ancient Lichen: Inside Outland dungeons.

Name: Elixir of Major Frost Power
Materials: 2x Mote of Water, 1x Ancient Lichen, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Frost Mages
Farming Notes: Mote of Water: Drops from water elementals in Nagrand (Skysong Lake, Halaa area), Zangarmarsh. 10 Motes = 1 Primal Water. Ancient Lichen: Inside Outland dungeons.

Name: Elixir of Healing Power
Materials: 1x Golden Sansam, 1x Dreaming Glory, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Healers (all specs)
Farming Notes: Golden Sansam: Classic herb from Felwood, Un'Goro Crater, Azshara, Eastern Plaguelands. Dreaming Glory: Common herb in all Outland zones.

Name: Adept's Elixir
Typical Users: Budget caster DPS and healers wanting damage + crit mix
Farming Notes: Dreamfoil: Classic herb from Un'Goro Crater, Azshara, Silithus, Eastern Plaguelands. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Onslaught Elixir
Typical Users: Budget physical DPS option
Farming Notes: Mountain Silversage: Classic herb from Winterspring, Eastern Plaguelands, Burning Steppes. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula.

Name: Fel Strength Elixir
Typical Users: Melee DPS willing to sacrifice stamina for AP
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest. Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm.

Name: Elixir of Demonslaying
Typical Users: Melee DPS and Hunters in demon-heavy raids (Hyjal, BT, Sunwell)
Farming Notes: Gromsblood: Classic herb from Desolace, Felwood, Blasted Lands. Ghost Mushroom: Classic herb found in caves - Maraudon, Hinterlands caves, Un'Goro caves, Dire Maul.

Name: Elixir of Major Defense
Typical Users: Tanks (Prot Warriors, Prot Paladins, Feral Druids)
Farming Notes: Ancient Lichen: Found inside Outland dungeons only (herb while running dungeons). Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest.

Name: Elixir of Major Fortitude
Typical Users: Tanks, anyone wanting extra survivability
Farming Notes: Ragveil: Herb in Zangarmarsh (swampy/mushroom areas). Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Elixir of Draenic Wisdom
Typical Users: Healers (especially Holy Priests, Resto Druids), caster DPS wanting mana pool
Farming Notes: Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh. Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest.

Name: Elixir of Major Mageblood
Typical Users: Healers, mana-hungry caster DPS
Farming Notes: Ancient Lichen: Found inside Outland dungeons only. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm.

Name: Elixir of Ironskin
Typical Users: Primarily PvP; niche tank use for crit reduction
Farming Notes: Ancient Lichen: Inside Outland dungeons. Ragveil: Herb in Zangarmarsh.

Name: Elixir of Empowerment
Typical Users: Caster DPS groups (benefits all spell damage dealers)
Farming Notes: Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm. Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges in all Outland zones.

Name: Earthen Elixir
Typical Users: Tanks, situational survivability
Farming Notes: Dreaming Glory: Common herb in all Outland zones. Ragveil: Herb in Zangarmarsh.

Name: Super Mana Potion
Typical Users: All mana users - most consumed potion in TBC raiding
Farming Notes: Dreaming Glory: Common herb in all Outland zones especially Nagrand. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Super Healing Potion
Typical Users: Tanks and anyone in danger of dying
Farming Notes: Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm. Felweed: Very common in Hellfire Peninsula and Zangarmarsh.

Name: Destruction Potion
Effect: +120 Spell Damage and +2% Spell Crit for 15 sec
Typical Users: Caster DPS (top pre-pot for casters)
Farming Notes: Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm.

Name: Haste Potion
Typical Users: Melee/ranged physical DPS (top pre-pot for physical DPS)
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm.

Name: Ironshield Potion
Materials: 2x Ancient Lichen, 3x Mote of Earth, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Tanks on heavy physical damage bosses
Farming Notes: Ancient Lichen: Inside Outland dungeons. Mote of Earth: Drops from earth elementals in Nagrand (Warmaul Hill), Shadowmoon Valley, Netherstorm. Also from mining Outland ore.

Name: Super Rejuvenation Potion
Materials: 2x Mana Thistle, 1x Dreaming Glory, 1x Netherbloom, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Hybrid classes (Paladins, Druids, Shamans)
Farming Notes: Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges in all Outland zones. Dreaming Glory: Common in all Outland zones. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm.

Name: Fel Mana Potion
Effect: Restores 3200 Mana over 24 sec (debuff: -25 Spell Dmg / -50 Healing for 15 min)
Materials: 2x Nightmare Vine, 1x Mana Thistle, 1x Crystal Vial
Typical Users: Hunters primarily (debuff irrelevant to them)
Farming Notes: Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm. Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges.

Name: Heroic Potion
Typical Users: Tanks (situational pre-pot)
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest. Ancient Lichen: Inside Outland dungeons.

Name: Insane Strength Potion
Typical Users: Melee DPS (risky but powerful pre-pot)
Farming Notes: Terocone: Herb in Terokkar Forest.

Name: Free Action Potion
Effect: Immune to Stun/Movement Impairing for 30 sec
Typical Users: Tanks on specific boss encounters with stun/root mechanics
Farming Notes: Blackmouth Oil: Crafted from Oily Blackmouth (fished in Classic coastal zones - Darkshore, Westfall, Stranglethorn). Stranglekelp: Classic underwater herb in coastal zones.

Name: Blackened Basilisk
Typical Users: Caster DPS (Mages, Warlocks, Shadow Priests, Boomkins, Ele Shamans)
Farming Notes: Chunk o' Basilisk: Kill basilisks in Terokkar Forest (Tuurem area, around Auchindoun). ~35% drop rate.

Name: Crunchy Serpent
Typical Users: Caster DPS (identical buff to Blackened Basilisk; alternate source)
Farming Notes: Serpent Flesh: Kill serpents in Blade's Edge Mountains. ~40% drop rate.

Name: Grilled Mudfish
Typical Users: Agi-based melee/ranged DPS (Rogues, Hunters, Feral Druids, Enh Shamans)
Farming Notes: Figluster's Mudfish: Fished in Nagrand (inland lakes and rivers). Requires ~305 fishing skill.

Name: Warp Burger
Typical Users: Agi-based melee/ranged DPS (identical buff to Grilled Mudfish; alternate source)
Farming Notes: Warped Flesh: Kill Warp Stalkers in Terokkar Forest. ~40% drop rate.

Name: Roasted Clefthoof
Typical Users: Strength-based melee DPS and tanks (Warriors, Paladins, Enh Shamans)
Farming Notes: Clefthoof Meat: Kill Clefthoofs in Nagrand. Very common drop (~50%). Also yields Thick Clefthoof Leather if skinned.

Name: Ravager Dog
Typical Users: Physical DPS who prefer flat AP over Agi/Str
Farming Notes: Ravager Flesh: Kill Ravagers in Hellfire Peninsula. ~50% drop rate. Very easy to mass farm early.

Name: Spicy Crawdad
Typical Users: Tanks (Prot Warriors, Prot Paladins, Feral Druids)
Farming Notes: Furious Crawdad: Fished from Highland Mixed School pools in elevated Terokkar lakes (Blackwind Lake, Lake Ere'Noru, Lake Jorune). Requires ~350+ fishing. Very profitable.

Name: Fisherman's Feast
Materials: 1x Huge Spotted Feltail, 1x Goldenbark Apple, 1x Soothing Spices
Typical Users: Tanks (identical buff to Spicy Crawdad; alternate recipe)
Farming Notes: Huge Spotted Feltail: Fished in any Outland water (Zangarmarsh best). Goldenbark Apple: Vendor purchased. Soothing Spices: Vendor purchased from cooking supply vendors.

Name: Golden Fish Sticks
Typical Users: Healers (all specs)
Farming Notes: Golden Darter: Fished in Terokkar Forest rivers and lakes. ~20% catch rate. Requires ~305 fishing.

Name: Spicy Hot Talbuk
Typical Users: DPS classes needing hit rating
Farming Notes: Talbuk Venison: Kill Talbuks in Nagrand. Common drop. Recipe from Nagrand faction vendors.

Name: Skullfish Soup
Effect: +20 Spell Crit Rating and +20 Spirit (30 min)
Typical Users: Caster DPS wanting spell crit over raw spell damage
Farming Notes: Crescent-Tail Skullfish: Fished in Terokkar Forest (rare catch). Requires ~350+ fishing skill. Recipe from Fishing daily quest.

Name: Broiled Bloodfin
Typical Users: Healers and mana-dependent casters preferring MP5
Farming Notes: Bloodfin Catfish: Fished in Outland waters. Recipe from Fishing daily quest reward.

Name: Superior Wizard Oil
Materials: 3x Arcane Dust, 1x Nightmare Vine, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Caster DPS (standard TBC caster weapon buff)
Farming Notes: Arcane Dust: Disenchant Outland green items (abundant from dungeons/questing). Nightmare Vine: Herb in Shadowmoon Valley and Netherstorm.

Name: Superior Mana Oil
Typical Users: Healers (standard TBC healer weapon buff)
Farming Notes: Arcane Dust: Disenchant Outland green items. Netherbloom: Herb in Netherstorm.

Name: Brilliant Wizard Oil
Effect: +36 Spell Damage and +14 Spell Crit (1hr; 5 charges)
Materials: 2x Large Brilliant Shard, 3x Firebloom, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Caster DPS wanting crit component (Classic-era recipe still used)
Farming Notes: Large Brilliant Shard: Disenchant Classic epic items or high-level rares. Firebloom: Classic herb from Searing Gorge, Blasted Lands, Tanaris.

Name: Brilliant Mana Oil
Materials: 2x Large Brilliant Shard, 3x Purple Lotus, 1x Imbued Vial
Typical Users: Healers (Classic-era alternative to Superior Mana Oil)
Farming Notes: Large Brilliant Shard: Disenchant Classic epic or high-level rare items. Purple Lotus: Classic herb from Felwood, Azshara, Hinterlands.

Name: Adamantite Sharpening Stone
Typical Users: Melee DPS with sharp weapons (swords/axes/daggers); cannot coexist with poisons or weapon imbues
Farming Notes: Adamantite Bar: Smelt from Adamantite Ore mined in Nagrand, Netherstorm, Shadowmoon Valley, Blade's Edge. Mote of Earth: Earth elementals in Nagrand, also from mining.

Name: Adamantite Weightstone
Typical Users: Melee DPS with blunt weapons (maces/fist weapons); cannot coexist with weapon imbues
Farming Notes: Adamantite Bar: Smelt from Adamantite Ore (Nagrand, Netherstorm, Shadowmoon, Blade's Edge). Netherweave Cloth: Drops from Outland humanoid mobs (very common).

Name: Drums of Battle
Effect: +80 Haste Rating to party for 30 sec (2 min CD; 50 charges)
Materials: 6x Heavy Knothide Leather, 4x Thick Clefthoof Leather
Typical Users: All raid groups - drum rotations are huge DPS/HPS gains
Farming Notes: Heavy Knothide Leather: Craft from 5x Knothide Leather (skinning Outland mobs). Thick Clefthoof Leather: Skinning Clefthoofs in Nagrand specifically. Very profitable to farm.

Name: Drums of War
Effect: +60 AP and +30 Spell Damage to party for 30 sec (2 min CD; 50 charges)
Typical Users: Lesser alternative to Drums of Battle
Farming Notes: Heavy Knothide Leather: Craft from 5x Knothide Leather. Fel Scales: Skinning reptile/dragonkin mobs in Blade's Edge Mountains, Shadowmoon Valley.

Name: Heavy Knothide Armor Kit
Typical Users: Tanks primarily; any raider wanting extra survivability
Farming Notes: Heavy Knothide Leather: Craft from 5x Knothide Leather (skinning any level 60-70 Outland beast mobs).

Name: Flame Cap
Effect: +80 Fire Spell Damage for 1 min; melee/ranged gain fire proc (3 min CD; own cooldown, NOT potion CD)
Typical Users: Fire Mages, Destro Warlocks, physical DPS (fire proc)
Farming Notes: Flame Cap: Gathered via Herbalism from Flame Cap nodes in Zangarmarsh (Spawning Glen area, near Coilfang Reservoir). Limited spawn points - great to farm at off-peak hours.

Name: Dark Rune
Effect: Restores 900-1500 mana; costs 600-1000 HP (2 min CD; independent of potion CD)
Typical Users: All mana users especially healers (second mana CD independent of potions)
Farming Notes: Drops from mobs in Scholomance (Necromancers, Dark Summoners). Tradeable on AH. Farm Scholomance for these.

Name: Demonic Rune
Effect: Restores 900-1500 mana; costs 600-1000 HP (2 min CD; shares CD with Dark Rune)
Typical Users: Same as Dark Rune (BoP so raiders must self-farm)
Farming Notes: Drops from demonic mobs in Felwood (Jadefire satyrs), Azshara (Legashi demons), Winterspring (Hederine demons). ~3-4% drop rate. Bind on Pickup.

Name: Cauldron of Major Fire Protection
Effect: Produces up to 25x Major Fire Protection Potions (absorb 2800-4000 fire damage)
Materials: 2x Primal Fire, 7x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Iron Casing
Typical Users: Entire raids on fire-heavy encounters
Farming Notes: Primal Fire: 10x Mote of Fire from fire elementals. Mana Thistle: Rare herb on cliff edges. Fel Iron Casing: Blacksmith-crafted from Fel Iron Bars.

Name: Cauldron of Major Shadow Protection
Effect: Produces up to 25x Major Shadow Protection Potions (absorb 2800-4000 shadow damage)
Materials: 2x Primal Shadow, 7x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Iron Casing
Typical Users: Entire raids on shadow-heavy encounters
Farming Notes: Primal Shadow: 10x Mote of Shadow from Void/Shadow creatures in Nagrand (Oshu'gun), Hellfire Peninsula. Mana Thistle: Rare herb. Fel Iron Casing: BS crafted.

Name: Cauldron of Major Nature Protection
Effect: Produces up to 25x Major Nature Protection Potions (absorb 2800-4000 nature damage)
Materials: 2x Primal Life, 7x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Iron Casing
Typical Users: Entire raids on nature-heavy encounters (Hydross, etc)
Farming Notes: Primal Life: 10x Mote of Life from plant/treant mobs in Zangarmarsh, Netherstorm. Mana Thistle: Rare herb. Fel Iron Casing: BS crafted.

Name: Cauldron of Major Frost Protection
Effect: Produces up to 25x Major Frost Protection Potions (absorb 2800-4000 frost damage)
Materials: 2x Primal Water, 7x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Iron Casing
Typical Users: Entire raids on frost-heavy encounters (Hydross ice phase)
Farming Notes: Primal Water: 10x Mote of Water from water elementals in Nagrand, Zangarmarsh. Mana Thistle: Rare herb. Fel Iron Casing: BS crafted.

Name: Cauldron of Major Arcane Protection
Effect: Produces up to 25x Major Arcane Protection Potions (absorb 2800-4000 arcane damage)
Materials: 2x Primal Mana, 7x Mana Thistle, 1x Fel Iron Casing
Typical Users: Entire raids on arcane-heavy encounters
Farming Notes: Primal Mana: 10x Mote of Mana from mana creatures in Netherstorm. Mana Thistle: Rare herb. Fel Iron Casing: BS crafted.

Name: Scroll of Agility V
Typical Users: Any agility user lacking a better buff
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Also crafted via Inscription in later patches. Sell on AH.

Name: Scroll of Strength V
Typical Users: Any strength user lacking a better buff
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Sell on AH.

Name: Scroll of Intellect V
Typical Users: Casters/healers lacking Arcane Intellect
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Sell on AH.

Name: Scroll of Stamina V
Typical Users: Tanks/anyone lacking PW:Fortitude
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Sell on AH.

Name: Scroll of Spirit V
Typical Users: Healers lacking Divine Spirit
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Sell on AH.

Name: Scroll of Protection V
Typical Users: Tanks lacking other armor buffs
Farming Notes: World drop from Outland mobs. Sell on AH.
